title: Single Barrel Air Cylinder Foot Pump Car Bike Motorcycle Van Tyre Inflator Gauge
features: Suitable for use with Bicycle and Motor Vehicle tyres, beach balls and other inflatable toys, rubber rafts, air beds, etc.
